# Store generated files under .ameliso/ folder in user repos

## Problem

Generated test files (cases, suites, runs) currently written to repo root-level dirs (`cases/`, `suites/`, `runs/`). Pollutes user repo root. No namespace isolation.

## Proposed Change

Prefix all generated paths with `.ameliso/`:

- `cases/{slug}.md` → `.ameliso/cases/{slug}.md`
- `suites/{slug}.yaml` → `.ameliso/suites/{slug}.yaml`
- `runs/{date}-{slug}/` → `.ameliso/runs/{date}-{slug}/`

## Scope

- Update path construction in server (wherever `cases/`, `suites/`, `runs/` paths are built)
- Update any path parsing/reading logic to strip or expect `.ameliso/` prefix
- Update `file_paths` returned in gRPC responses
- Update DB path storage if paths are persisted
- `.ameliso/` is a hidden dotdir — stays out of user's way, clearly owned by Ameliso

## Why

- Keeps user repo root clean
- Clear ownership — everything Ameliso touches is in one folder
- Easy to `.gitignore` selectively or audit what Ameliso wrote
- Conventional (similar to `.github/`, `.husky/`, `.changeset/`)
